apply to become an operator
Operator is a role on the Prisma platform for contributors of robot data. Users must proactively apply, and only after approval by an administrator can they upload robot trajectory data and earn rewards.

Functional objectives:

Users submit an Operator application (including robot information)

Administrators review the application in the backend (approve / reject)

Review results are synchronized to the user frontend in real time

After approval, an email notification is sent to the user, and system administrators are also notified
